message:
feat(connectors): scaffold Google Drive and Google Sheets connectors

Add two new Google-family connectors following established structure.
Google Drive (API v3): file listing, metadata, upload, download, folder
management, and sharing. Google Sheets (API v4): spreadsheet reading,
writing, cell formatting, sheet management, and batch operations. Both
depend on fcp-google-discovery substrate, include full type definitions
with serde roundtrip tests, error taxonomies with ConnectorErrorMapping,
and integration with fcp-sdk and fcp-async-core.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -0,0 +1,41 @@
+[package]
+name = "fcp-google-drive"
+description = "Google Drive connector for the Flywheel Connector Protocol"
+version.workspace = true
+edition.workspace = true
+rust-version.workspace = true
+license.workspace = true
+repository.workspace = true
+authors.workspace = true
+
+[lib]
+name = "fcp_google_drive"
+path = "src/lib.rs"
+
+[[bin]]
+name = "fcp-google-drive"
+path = "src/main.rs"
+
+[lints]
+workspace = true
+
+[dependencies]
+fcp-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-core" }
+fcp-async-core = { path = "../../crates/fcp-async-core" }
+fcp-sdk = { path = "../../crates/fcp-sdk" }
+fcp-google-discovery = { path = "../../crates/fcp-google-discovery" }
+
+anyhow.workspace = true
+async-trait.workspace = true
+reqwest.workspace = true
+serde.workspace = true
+serde_json.workspace = true
+thiserror.workspace = true
+tracing.workspace = true
+tracing-subscriber.workspace = true
+
+[dev-dependencies]
+wiremock.workspace = true
+fcp-crypto = { path = "../../crates/fcp-crypto" }
+fcp-manifest = { path = "../../crates/fcp-manifest" }
+fcp-testkit = { path = "../../crates/fcp-testkit" }

@@ -0,0 +1,40 @@
+[connector]
+name = "google-drive"
+version = "0.1.0"
+description = "Google Drive API v3 connector for file management"
+archetype = "request-response"
+
+[connector.zones]
+allowed = ["z:owner", "z:private", "z:work", "z:project:*"]
+
+[connector.capabilities]
+required = ["drive.read"]
+optional = ["drive.write"]
+
+[provides.operations.drive.list_files]
+summary = "List files and folders in Google Drive"
+capability = "drive.read"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.get_file]
+summary = "Get file metadata by ID"
+capability = "drive.read"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.download_file]
+summary = "Download file content"
+capability = "drive.read"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.create_folder]
+summary = "Create a new folder"
+capability = "drive.write"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.upload_file]
+summary = "Upload a file"
+capability = "drive.write"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.trash_file]
+summary = "Move a file to trash"
+capability = "drive.write"
+
+[provides.operations.drive.share_file]
+summary = "Share a file with a user"
+capability = "drive.write"

@@ -0,0 +1,38 @@
+//! FCP Google Drive Connector library.
+//!
+//! Provides the Google Drive API v3 connector implementing the Flywheel
+//! Connector Protocol. Covers file listing, metadata, upload, download,
+//! folder management, and sharing.
+
+#![forbid(unsafe_code)]
+#![allow(dead_code)]
+#![allow(
+    clippy::cast_possible_truncation,
+    clippy::cast_precision_loss,
+    clippy::cast_sign_loss,
+    clippy::derivable_impls,
+    clippy::future_not_send,
+    clippy::float_cmp,
+    clippy::manual_unwrap_or_default,
+    clippy::match_same_arms,
+    clippy::option_if_let_else,
+    clippy::or_fun_call,
+    clippy::redundant_closure_for_method_calls,
+    clippy::assertions_on_constants,
+    clippy::struct_field_names,
+    clippy::suboptimal_flops,
+    clippy::too_many_arguments,
+    clippy::too_many_lines,
+    clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref,
+    clippy::unreadable_literal,
+    clippy::missing_errors_doc,
+    clippy::missing_panics_doc,
+    clippy::missing_const_for_fn,
+    clippy::doc_markdown,
+    clippy::unused_async
+)]
+
+pub mod client;
+pub mod connector;
+pub mod error;
+pub mod types;
